definition: The body of binding rules and regulations, customs and standards established in a community by its legislative and judicial authorities.
example: entrapment is against the law
exampleVi: bắt giữ là vi phạm pháp luật

definition: The legal department of a company.
example: Legal wants this in writing.
exampleVi: Pháp lý muốn điều này bằng văn bản.

definition: An illegal act or technique.
example: We need to understand the concept of illegal.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bất hợp pháp.

definition: A professional person qualified (as by a law degree or bar exam) and authorized to practice law, i.e. represent parties in lawsuits or trials and give legal advice.
example: A lawyer's time and advice are his stock in trade. - aphorism often credited to Abraham Lincoln, but without attestation
exampleVi: Thời gian và lời khuyên của một luật sư là cổ phiếu của anh ta trong giao dịch. - câu cách ngôn thường được cho là của Abraham Lincoln, nhưng không có sự chứng thực

definition: A lawyer; one who advises or represents others in legal matters as a profession.
example: We need to understand the concept of attorney.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm luật sư.

definition: An enclosed space; a courtyard; an uncovered area shut in by the walls of a building, or by different buildings; also, a space opening from a street and nearly surrounded by houses; a blind alley.
example: The girls were playing in the court.
exampleVi: Các cô gái đang chơi ở sân.

definition: A public official whose duty it is to administer the law, especially by presiding over trials and rendering judgments; a justice.
example: We need to understand the concept of judge.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thẩm phán.

definition: A group of individuals chosen from the general population to hear and decide a case in a court of law.
example: We need to understand the concept of jury.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bồi thẩm đoàn.

definition: An opportunity to test something out; a test.
example: They will perform the trials for the new equipment next week.
exampleVi: Họ sẽ tiến hành thử nghiệm thiết bị mới vào tuần tới.

definition: An actual event, situation, or fact.
example: For a change, in this case, he was telling the truth.
exampleVi: Để thay đổi, trong trường hợp này, anh ấy đã nói sự thật.

definition: A set of clothes to be worn together, now especially a man's matching jacket and trousers (also business suit or lounge suit), or a similar outfit for a woman.
example: Nick hired a navy-blue suit for the wedding.
exampleVi: Nick đã thuê một bộ đồ màu xanh nước biển cho đám cưới.

definition: To file a legal action against someone, generally a non-criminal action.
example: We need to understand the concept of sue.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm kiện tụng.

definition: Facts or observations presented in support of an assertion.
example: There is no evidence that anyone was here earlier.
exampleVi: Không có bằng chứng nào cho thấy có người đã ở đây trước đó.

definition: Attestation of a fact or event; testimony.
example: She can bear witness, since she was there at the time.
exampleVi: Cô ấy có thể làm chứng vì cô ấy đã ở đó vào thời điểm đó.

definition: Statements made by a witness in court.
example: We need to understand the concept of testimony.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lời chứng.

definition: A decision on an issue of fact in a civil or criminal case or an inquest.
example: The jury returned a “not guilty” verdict.
exampleVi: Bồi thẩm đoàn đã đưa ra phán quyết "không có tội".

definition: The decision or judgement of a jury or court; a verdict.
example: The court returned a sentence of guilt in the first charge, but innocence in the second.
exampleVi: Tòa tuyên án có tội ở cáo buộc đầu tiên nhưng vô tội ở cáo buộc thứ hai.

definition: A place or institution of confinement, especially of long-term confinement for those convicted of serious crimes or otherwise considered undesirable by the government.
example: The cold stone walls of the prison had stood for over a century.
exampleVi: Những bức tường đá lạnh lẽo của nhà tù đã tồn tại hơn một thế kỷ.

definition: A place or institution for the confinement of persons held in lawful custody or detention, especially for minor offenses or with reference to some future judicial proceeding.
example: We need to understand the concept of jail.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhà tù.

definition: A specific act committed in violation of the law.
example: We need to understand the concept of crime.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tội phạm.

definition: Written law, as laid down by the legislature.
example: We need to understand the concept of statute.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm pháp luật.

definition: The act of regulating or the condition of being regulated.
example: We need to understand the concept of regulation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm điều chỉnh.

definition: A short symbol, often with little relation to the item it represents.
example: This flavour of soup has been assigned the code WRT-9.
exampleVi: Hương vị súp này đã được gán mã WRT-9.

definition: That which complies with justice, law or reason.
example: We're on the side of right in this contest.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi đứng về phía bên phải trong cuộc thi này.

definition: The state or characteristic of being just or fair.
example: the justice of a description
exampleVi: sự công bằng của một mô tả

definition: The action of defending or protecting from attack, danger, or injury.
example: We need to understand the concept of defense.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phòng thủ.

definition: The act of prosecuting a scheme or endeavor.
example: The prosecution of the war fell to Winston Churchill.
exampleVi: Việc truy tố chiến tranh rơi vào tay Winston Churchill.

definition: An application for the removal of a cause or suit from an inferior to a superior judge or court for re-examination or review.
example: We need to understand the concept of appeal.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm kháng cáo.

definition: A customer, a buyer or receiver of goods or services.
example: We need to understand the concept of client.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khách hàng.

definition: In civil law, a case where two or more people disagree and one or more of the parties take the case to a court for resolution.
example: The lawyer advised his client against filing a lawsuit as it would take a lot of time and money to resolve.
exampleVi: Luật sư khuyên khách hàng của mình không nên khởi kiện vì việc giải quyết sẽ tốn rất nhiều thời gian và tiền bạc.

definition: The act or process of arbitrating.
example: We need to understand the concept of arbitration.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trọng tài.

definition: A local law
example: We need to understand the concept of ordinance.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm pháp lệnh.

definition: A party bringing a suit in civil law against a defendant; accusers.
example: We need to understand the concept of plaintiff.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nguyên đơn.

definition: The exchange of opinions and advice especially in legal issues; consultation.
example: We need to understand the concept of counsel.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tư vấn.

definition: Serving, or suitable, for defense; defensive, defending.
example: We need to understand the concept of defendant.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bị cáo.

definition: The act of judging.
example: We need to understand the concept of judgment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phán xét.

definition: The act, or process of setting something up, or establishing something; the composition or structure of such a thing; its makeup.
example: We need to understand the concept of constitution.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hiến pháp.

definition: The conduct of a lawsuit.
example: That attorney has been chastised for his litigation behavior.
exampleVi: Luật sư đó đã bị trừng phạt vì hành vi kiện tụng của mình.

definition: An instance of exhibiting.
example: We need to understand the concept of exhibit.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm triển lãm.

definition: To move, pass, or go forward or onward; to advance; to carry on
example: To proceed on a journey.
exampleVi: Để tiếp tục một cuộc hành trình.

definition: (stative) To perceive sounds through the ear.
example: I was deaf, and now I can hear.
exampleVi: Tôi đã bị điếc và bây giờ tôi có thể nghe được.

definition: A lawyer of noncontentious private civil law who drafts, takes, and records legal instruments for private parties, and provides legal advice, but does not appear in court on clients' behalf.
example: We need to understand the concept of notary.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm công chứng.

definition: A person with extensive knowledge or ability in a given subject.
example: We called in several experts on the subject, but they couldn't reach an agreement.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã mời một số chuyên gia về chủ đề này nhưng họ không thể đạt được thỏa thuận.

definition: A judicial officer with limited authority to administer and enforce the law. A magistrate's court may have jurisdiction in civil or criminal cases, or both.
example: We need to understand the concept of magistrate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thẩm phán.

definition: Something done so as to accomplish a purpose.
example: We need to understand the concept of action.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hành động.

definition: A lawyer with the right to speak and argue as an advocate in higher lawcourts.
example: We need to understand the concept of barrister.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm luật sư.

definition: Someone whose job is to speak for someone's case in a court of law; a counsel.
example: We need to understand the concept of advocate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người bào chữa.

definition: One who solicits.
example: We need to understand the concept of solicitor.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm luật sư.
